mapper.select: SELECT a.AUDIO_ID, a.SENTENCE_ID, a.LANGUAGE_CODE, a.VOICE_NAME, a.AUDIO_TYPE, a.SPEAKING_RATE, a.AUDIO_URL, a.STORAGE_KEY, a.PROVIDER, a.FORMAT, a.IS_ACTIVE, a.CREATED_AT, a.UPDATED_AT FROM TB_SENTENCE_AUDIO a JOIN TB_SENTENCE s ON s.SENTENCE_ID = a.SENTENCE_ID WHERE a.SENTENCE_ID = #{sentenceId} AND s.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND s.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND a.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY a.AUDIO_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_SENTENCE_AUDIO a SET a.IS_ACTIVE = 'N', a.UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE a.SENTENCE_ID = #{sentenceId} AND a.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_SENTENCE s WHERE s.SENTENCE_ID = a.SENTENCE_ID AND s.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND s.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_SENTENCE_AUDIO ( SENTENCE_ID, LANGUAGE_CODE, VOICE_NAME, AUDIO_TYPE, SPEAKING_RATE, AUDIO_URL, STORAGE_KEY, PROVIDER, FORMAT, IS_ACTIVE ) VALUES ( #{sentenceId}, #{languageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voiceName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{audioType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{speakingRate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{audioUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{provider, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{format, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isActive, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.AUDIO_ID, a.SENTENCE_ID, a.LANGUAGE_CODE, a.VOICE_NAME, a.AUDIO_TYPE, a.SPEAKING_RATE, a.AUDIO_URL, a.STORAGE_KEY, a.PROVIDER, a.FORMAT, a.IS_ACTIVE, a.CREATED_AT, a.UPDATED_AT FROM TB_SENTENCE_AUDIO a JOIN TB_SENTENCE s ON s.SENTENCE_ID = a.SENTENCE_ID WHERE a.AUDIO_ID = #{audioId} AND s.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND s.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
